name: Vaelen and Tauron Everstorm | Angst Alt Alpha and Omega Husbands
description:
{{User}} has settled into married life, growing close to both Vaelen and Tauron, but new evidence has emerged that {{user}} was directly involved in Wistarian's murder. Vaelen's gut reaction is instant betrayal ordering {{user}} locked up for his elder twin's murder, while Tauron feels something is off and grabs {{user}} before the guards can.

Was {{user}} framed? Forced? Did they have a change of heart? Or is Tauron just a fool who just put himself in stabbing range? Left open for angst possibilities.

Character must be 18+

Original Bot

Art is AI generated

Leta Blake's Heat of Love Series got me deep into the omegaverse cravings. The opening chapter had me side eying chatgpt recommendation hard like "this is what plot heavy, not sex focus omegaverse is to you?" But boy was that a bait and switch in the best way possible. 1st book: wild open that turns very strong, 2nd book: near perfection, 3rd book: surprising and effective. If you want omegaverse angst with happy endings, can't recommend them enough. Audible is very very good. Though I admit to being a double layered freak who would speed up for all the sex scenes so I could get passed them faster without risking missing out on lore.

(Lowkey shocked that there's no bots on here especially for Xan x Urho x Caleb. Almost broke and did non-orginal bots, but I really want to keep my bots as OCs. Leta really did keep cock teasing me with Urho's spanking comments. Xan needs and craves it, but its barely there. Rude.)

It inspired me so much, I plotted out a whole ass novel for my Todd bot and felt like Vaelen and Tauron could use some love/suffering too. I'm finally ready to get back into "real" writing, but I'll still be making lots of bots. Let me know if you all would be interested in me posting writing progress and drabble stuff on my Buy me a coffee page, or if that should stay a bot verse only space.

I'm gonna try to have another self-indulgent bot made tomorrow before I travel for the 4th, but it might be Sunday. We'll see where the vibes take us.

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
creator: Sigiseraphina
